items.title: Error categories and messages: correct the failure model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this documented beginner mistake? Every red message is the root cause, so fixing the last diagnostic first is the fastest strategy.

feedback.correct: Correct. Classify the phase, start with the earliest actionable cause, reproduce minimally, and confirm the repair removes the original failure without creating another.
feedback.incorrect: The selected statement preserves the documented misconception. Classify the phase, start with the earliest actionable cause, reproduce minimally, and confirm the repair removes the original failure without creating another.
